items.name_en: Loewe Puzzle. The woven handle is distinctive and unforgettable.
items.name_cn:
Loewe Puzzle. The woven handle is distinctive and unforgettable.
Model 3001A
Made from imported Spanish calfskin 🐄, it is soft and supple. The precise cutting allows it to fold naturally, suitable for hand-carry or crossbody (multiple uses). Detachable long shoulder strap. Textile lining, Small 24-14-11

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
L❤ewe Hammock New Size 'Light Green Lamé'
Hammock is a versatile bag with a soft side panel that can be released to change its shape. The ring strap allows for multiple carrying ways. This new compact version is made of soft grained calfskin.
Crossbody, shoulder carry, or top handle
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Internal hook-and-eye closure
Two internal slip pockets, one external zip pocket
Customizable with shoulder strap and personalized charms
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram embossing
Model: 3813
Size: 19.5×14.5×20cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 New Puzzle Hobo is a soft and refined short Nappa leather shoulder bag 👜 Inspired by the Puzzle bag's rectangular shape and unique geometric lines, it starts with looks and stays true to the leather, especially the softness of the puzzle hobo which is stunning 🎀 The colors are super nice, stylish and versatile, cool yet sweet, really amazing, I love it 😻 Classic Nappa leather, soft and delicate to the touch~ The geometric design is really durable and can be carried for a long time 💚 Short shoulder strap, one external zip pocket and one interior pocket ✨ Leather zip pull, D-ring to connect personalized charms 🔗 Chevron cotton canvas with Anagram embossing 🛍️
Dimensions: 28CM~10CM~5.5CM
Style No.: 8018
Color: Moss Green

items.name_en: 🔥Every year Luo releases a unique white canvas bag 💄and it's always very popular. The year before last there was the Toast bag, last year the Paula's bag, and this year we welcome the latest Cushion Tote bag~~Simply amazing! ✅👻❤️Featuring exclusive custom Taiwan-imported canvas paired with imported calfskin 💥A drawstring-style opening with knotted cords at the four corners, and an internal fixed "support" structure to maintain shape. The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯
items.name_cn:
🔥Every year Luo releases a unique white canvas bag 💄and it's always very popular. The year before last there was the Toast bag, last year the Paula's bag, and this year we welcome the latest Cushion Tote bag~~Simply amazing! ✅👻❤️Featuring exclusive custom Taiwan-imported canvas paired with imported calfskin 💥A drawstring-style opening with knotted cords at the four corners, and an internal fixed "support" structure to maintain shape. The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯
Size: 32CM~26CM~16CM
Style No.: 8015
Color: Canvas Brown

items.name_en: 🔥Brand new Jacquard Canvas LOE💎WE Font Tote Handbag 👜The LOE💎WE Font Tote is a rectangular handbag featuring a contrasting LOE✨WE logo 🧸The medium size is made of jacquard canvas 🩶with leather trim.*Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Detachable adjustable shoulder strap*Fabric lining
